title: Targa Resources (TRGP) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: An intrinsic value estimate for Targa Resources (TRGP). Due to negative free cash flow (-264 million), a standard Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model is not feasible.
methodology: DCF analysis was attempted but aborted due to deeply negative base free cash flow. A reliable projection of future cash flows and enterprise value cannot be calculated from the current financial baseline.
